'''R4-M6''' was an [[R4-P astromech droid]] socketed into [[Mace Windu's Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor|Mace Windu's Eta-2 ''Actis''-class interceptor]]. The droid was destroyed during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]], after [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] collided with a fleet of [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|vulture droids]] and [[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|droid tri-fighters]].<ref name="CWCite" />

==Characteristics==
R4-M6 featured a silver dome and purple plating.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Hasbro]] released an action figure of R4-M6 in [[2006]].
